headline: Pricing Sensitivity Survey Strategy & Implementation Roadmap — Ready for Deployment
highlights: Complete pricing survey strategy with van Westendorp PSM methodology for testing $1,200/year assumption
Step-by-step deployment guide: Google Form template, email campaign, prospect targeting, 7-day collection timeline
Quantitative & qualitative analysis framework: price distribution, competitive spend baseline, feature-price justification
Unit economics model showing 135:1 LTV:CAC ratio at $1,200 (far exceeds 3:1 threshold)
Decision tree: IF <40% select $1,200 THEN adjust price; IF >60% THEN lock assumption
10-day execution roadmap: deploy day 1, collect days 2-8, analyze days 8-9, report day 10
Risk mitigation: min 5 responses needed, quality validation rules, outlier detection, data integrity checks
Integration with DE Framework: Phase 5 Step 21 (Test Assumptions) feeds into Phase 4 Step 15 (Design Business Model)
Production-ready templates: Google Form questions, email invites, analysis spreadsheets, git commit workflow

next_actions.label: Extract top 10-15 prospects from email campaign engagement data
Create Google Form using deployment guide template
Deploy survey invitations and collect responses for 7 days
Analyze responses and write pricing report (documents/pricing_survey_results.md)
Commit survey results and raw data to GitHub

args.commit_message: Add pricing sensitivity survey results: validate/adjust $1,200 assumption
